attributes.Sql Query:

, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.DOC_ROUNDING_ENTERED_AMT
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.DOC_ROUNDING_ACCTD_AMT
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR

, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_SOURCE_ID_NUM_2
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_SOURCE_ID_NUM_3

, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_NUM_1

, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_NUM_4
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_NUM_5
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_CHAR_1
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_CHAR_2
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_CHAR_3
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_CHAR_4
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.ALLOC_TO_DIST_ID_CHAR_5
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.GAIN_OR_LOSS_REF
, CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME               
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE  
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  APPLICATION_ID ,AE_HEADER_ID ,REF_AE_HEADER_ID ,TEMP_LINE_NUM ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS
WHERE CDC_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
